name: "Submit a Skill / 提交 Skill"

labels: skill-submission
---

<!-- Pick one language, or use both! / 中英文都行 -->

## Skill 名字 / Skill Name

`your-skill-name`

## GitHub 链接 / Repo URL

https://github.com/...

## 一句话介绍 / What does it do?

<!-- 一句话说明这个 skill 是干嘛的 -->

## 分类 / Category

<!-- 选一个最合适的 / Pick the best fit -->

- [ ] 日常生产力 (Productivity)
- [ ] 搜索与研究 (Search)
- [ ] 记忆与上下文 (Memory)
- [ ] 写作与内容 (Writing)
- [ ] 任务编排 (Automation)
- [ ] 创意可视化 (Creative)
- [ ] AI Agent 联动 (Agents)
- [ ] 开发者工具 (Developer)
- [ ] 通讯社交 (Comms)
- [ ] 安全红队 (Security)
- [ ] 娱乐游戏 (Fun)
- [ ] 工作区 GUI (GUI)
- [ ] 其他 / Other: ____

## 安装方式 / Install Command

```bash
# e.g. git clone https://github.com/user/skill ~/.hermes/skills/skill
```

## 兼容平台 / Compatible Platforms

- [ ] Hermes
- [ ] Claude Code
- [ ] OpenClaw
- [ ] Other: ____

## 补充 / Anything else?

<!-- 可选：为什么推荐这个 skill？有什么坑？ -->
